scenarios.name: learning_procrastination
inputs: I wanted to study, but I watched short videos for two hours instead.
The assignment feels too big, so I keep cleaning my desk instead of starting.
I delayed the resume project again because I did not know the first step.

scenarios.name: high_sensitivity
inputs: A classmate replied with one short sentence and I thought about it all afternoon.
When someone does not answer my message, I check my phone again and again.
One joke from a friend made me feel rejected, and I avoided the group chat.

scenarios.name: long_term_confusion
inputs: I do not know what I really want to do after graduation.
Making money feels pointless lately, and I do not know what I am moving toward.
I feel stuck between career choices and keep postponing every decision.
